items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in kiCode111 like-girl 5.2.0 and classified as critical. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /admin/ipAddPost.php. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.
